allow: Bash(python3 -c "from main import app; print\('OK', [r.path for r in app.routes]\)")
Bash(curl -s -i -X OPTIONS http://127.0.0.1:8000/check-ingredients -H "Origin: chrome-extension://abc" -H "Access-Control-Request-Method: POST" -H "Access-Control-Request-Headers: content-type")

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8000/check-ingredients -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Origin: chrome-extension://abc" -d '{"ingredients":"Enriched flour, whey, soy lecithin, peanut oil, salt"}')
